sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71837" key="curo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξῠρός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n71837.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ξυρόν</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0417.tlg001:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.66</biblScope></bibl>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.288</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>) ; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ξ. εἰς ἀκόνην,</foreign> prov. of lucky meetings, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
